title: Add rate limiting to API
description:
Implement rate limiting on all /api/* endpoints.

Requirements:
- Use express-rate-limit package
- 100 requests per 15 minutes per IP
- Return 429 with JSON error message
- Skip rate limiting for health endpoint

title: Add request logging middleware
description:
Log all incoming requests with timestamp, method, path, and response time.

Format: [timestamp] METHOD /path - 200 (45ms)

Use the existing logger from @protolabs-ai/utils.

title: Create API documentation page
description:
Add /docs route that displays available API endpoints.

List all routes from the routes/ directory with:
- HTTP method
- Path
- Brief description

Use a simple HTML template, no external dependencies.
